routes.purpose: 現在のログインユーザー取得

notes: Frontend currently uses localStorage for both users and current_user_id, so release should replace that with persisted API reads/writes.
Keep snake_case fields exactly as in the prototype: current_user_id, created_at, updated_at, male_count, female_count, other_count, avg_age, adult_count.
Register static route /api/users/stats before /api/users/:id-style handlers to avoid Express route shadowing.
POST and PUT routes should return the full user record because the UI edits and list state depend on complete objects.
GET /api/session should return either null-safe session info or a current user object shape the frontend can consume without local derivation.
Deleting the currently logged-in user should also invalidate the active session for consistency.
releaseManifest.releaseStrategy: Convert the localStorage-based user registry into an API-driven CRUD + session app with explicit stats and auth/session routes, using migration-safe SQLite tables and response shapes that match frontend state exactly.

errors.sql:
SELECT s.id, s.user_id, s.token, s.created_at, s.logged_out_at, " +
    "u.name, u.gender, u.age, u.created_at AS user_created_at, u.updated_at " +
    "FROM sessions s " +
    "INNER JOIN users u ON

SELECT " +
      "COUNT(*) AS total, " +
      "SUM(CASE WHEN gender = 'male' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_count, " +
      "SUM(CASE WHEN gender = 'female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS female_count, " +
